scenario: RBAC Forbidden — ServiceAccount has no ClusterRoleBinding
notes: Pod is Running but completely non-functional: every API call returns 403 Forbidden. The ServiceAccount exists and a ClusterRole is defined, but there is no ClusterRoleBinding connecting them. Fix: kubectl create clusterrolebinding audit-exporter-binding --clusterrole=audit-exporter-role --serviceaccount=monitoring:audit-exporter-sa
